waterfall: The image shows a waterfall chart with a start bar, signed contribution bars, connector lines, and a final-total bar.
The figure shows a waterfall chart with a start bar, signed contribution bars, connector lines, and a final-total bar.
The visual shows a waterfall chart with a start bar, signed contribution bars, connector lines, and a final-total bar.
The chart shows a waterfall chart with a start bar, signed contribution bars, connector lines, and a final-total bar.
The image contains a waterfall chart with a start bar, signed contribution bars, connector lines, and a final-total bar.

running_total_after_step: What is the running total after contribution "{target_step_label}"?
Starting from the start bar, add the signed contributions through "{target_step_label}". What running total do you get?
Use the start value and signed contribution bars up to "{target_step_label}". What is the cumulative total after that step?
After applying contribution "{target_step_label}", what is the running total?
Compute the waterfall total at the end of step "{target_step_label}".
running_total_extremum_value: Across the start bar and contribution bars, what is the {extremum_word} cumulative total reached?
Ignoring the summary final bar, scan the start and contribution bars. What is the {extremum_word} running total?
What is the {extremum_word} running total reached by the waterfall sequence before the final summary bar?
Use the start bar and signed contribution bars. What {extremum_word} cumulative total appears in the sequence?
Among the start and contribution bars, find the {extremum_word} cumulative total. What is its value?
remove_step_final_total: If contribution "{target_step_label}" were {counterfactual_phrase}, what would the final total be?
The final bar includes every signed contribution. If "{target_step_label}" were {counterfactual_phrase}, what final total would result?
Remove the effect of contribution "{target_step_label}" from the final total. What value remains?
What would the final total be after excluding contribution "{target_step_label}"?
Use the final-total bar and contribution "{target_step_label}". If that contribution were {counterfactual_phrase}, what is the new final total?
reverse_step_final_total: Contribution "{target_step_label}" is {target_delta_text}. If it changed sign to {reversed_delta_text} while all other contributions stayed the same, what would the final total be?
The final bar includes every signed contribution. If "{target_step_label}" changed from {target_delta_text} to {reversed_delta_text}, what final total would result?
Reverse only contribution "{target_step_label}" from {target_delta_text} to {reversed_delta_text}. Keeping all other contributions the same, what is the final total?
What would the final total be if contribution "{target_step_label}" changed sign from {target_delta_text} to {reversed_delta_text}?
Use the final-total bar and contribution "{target_step_label}". If that contribution changed from {target_delta_text} to {reversed_delta_text}, what is the new final total?

query:running_total_after_step.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested running total as an integer
query:running_total_after_step.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the full waterfall bars from the start bar through the target contribution bar, including the target contribution bar

query:running_total_extremum_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cumulative total as an integer
query:running_total_extremum_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the full start or contribution bar where that cumulative total is reached

query:remove_step_final_total.answer_hint: set "answer" to the counterfactual final total as an integer
query:remove_step_final_total.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "final_total_bar" and "target_contribution_bar" to [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the full waterfall bars

query:reverse_step_final_total.answer_hint: set "answer" to the counterfactual final total as an integer
query:reverse_step_final_total.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "final_total_bar" and "target_contribution_bar" to [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the full waterfall bars
